semantic_description: Verifies a read-only two-pointer search over a sorted integer array. The function keeps left and right indices, compares a[left] + a[right] with target, returns 1 when an in-range pair summing to target is found, and returns 0 only after the search interval is exhausted. The contract requires sorted input, integer-range safety for all pair sums, and preservation of the input array memory.
